hooks.command: bash -c 'GO_VER=$(grep "^go " go.mod | awk "{print \$2}") && INSTALL_DIR=/usr/local/go${GO_VER}.0 && if [ ! -d "$INSTALL_DIR" ]; then ZIP=/tmp/go${GO_VER}.0.zip && curl -fsSL -o $ZIP "https://proxy.golang.org/golang.org/toolchain/@v/v0.0.1-go${GO_VER}.0.linux-amd64.zip" && mkdir -p /tmp/go${GO_VER}.0_extract && unzip -q $ZIP -d /tmp/go${GO_VER}.0_extract && mv "/tmp/go${GO_VER}.0_extract/golang.org/toolchain@v0.0.1-go${GO_VER}.0.linux-amd64" $INSTALL_DIR && chmod +x $INSTALL_DIR/bin/go && rm -rf $ZIP /tmp/go${GO_VER}.0_extract; fi && rm -f /usr/local/go && ln -s $INSTALL_DIR /usr/local/go && GOTOOLCHAIN=local go version'
